# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release and Publish

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

permissions:
  contents: write
  packages: write

jobs:
  validate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.get_version.outputs.version }}
      tag: ${{ steps.get_version.outputs.tag }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Get version from tag
        id: get_version
        run: |
          TAG=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}
          VERSION=${TAG#v}
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "tag=$TAG" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Validate tag format
        run: |
          if [[ ! "${{ steps.get_version.outputs.tag }}" =~ ^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+(-.*)?$ ]]; then
            echo "Invalid tag format. Must be v*.*.* (e.g., v1.0.0)"
            exit 1
          fi

  build-node:
    needs: validate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: hashFiles('package.json') != ''
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Verify version matches tag
        run: |
          PACKAGE_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
          if [ "v$PACKAGE_VERSION" != "${{ needs.validate.outputs.tag }}" ]; then
            echo "Package version (v$PACKAGE_VERSION) does not match tag (${{ needs.validate.outputs.tag }})"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Build package
        run: npm run build
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Upload Node artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: node-dist
          path: |
            dist/
            package.json
            package-lock.json
            README.md
            LICENSE
          retention-days: 1

  build-python:
    needs: validate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: hashFiles('setup.py') != '' || hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != ''
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'

      - name: Install build tools
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install build twine setuptools wheel

      - name: Verify version matches tag
        run: |
          if [ -f "setup.py" ]; then
            PYTHON_VERSION=$(python setup.py --version)
          elif [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            PYTHON_VERSION=$(grep -E '^version\s*=' pyproject.toml | head -1 | sed -E 's/.*"([^"]+)".*/\1/')
          fi
          if [ "v$PYTHON_VERSION" != "${{ needs.validate.outputs.tag }}" ]; then
            echo "Python version (v$PYTHON_VERSION) does not match tag (${{ needs.validate.outputs.tag }})"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          if [ -f "requirements-dev.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
          fi
          if [ -f "pytest.ini" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            pip install pytest
            pytest
          fi
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Build package
        run: python -m build

      - name: Check distribution
        run: twine check dist/*

      - name: Upload Python artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-dist
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 1

  create-release:
    needs: [validate, build-node, build-python]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always() && needs.validate.result == 'success' && (needs.build-node.result == 'success' || needs.build-node.result == 'skipped') && (needs.build-python.result == 'success' || needs.build-python.result == 'skipped')
    outputs:
      upload_url: ${{ steps.create_release.outputs.upload_url }}
      release_id: ${{ steps.create_release.outputs.id }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Generate changelog
        id: changelog
        run: |
          PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git tag --sort=-v:refname | grep -E '^v[0-9]' | head -2 | tail -1)
          if [ -z "$PREVIOUS_TAG" ]; then
            PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git rev-list --max-parents=0 HEAD)
          fi
          
          CHANGELOG=$(git log $PREVIOUS_TAG..${{ needs.validate.outputs.tag }} --pretty=format:"- %s (%h)" --no-merges)
          
          if [ -z "$CHANGELOG" ]; then
            CHANGELOG="- Initial release"
          fi
          
          echo "changelog<<EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "$CHANGELOG" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Create Release
        id: create_release
        uses: actions/create-release@v1
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ needs.validate.outputs.tag }}
          release_name: Release ${{ needs.validate.outputs.tag }}
          body: |
            ## What's Changed
            
            ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.changelog }}
            
            ## Installation
            
            ### npm
